title: johnstonella racemosa
intro: Johnstonella racemosa, also known as White Globe Mallow, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Johnstonella racemosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Johnstonella racemosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
